sections.paragraph:
f. ( Job 41:16).-

(1) a part cut off, a slice of an apple, or fig, Son 4:3 1Sa 30:12.

(2) a mill-stone, so called from the even and cut away part, which is the lower in the upper mill-stone, the upper in the nether. Arab. فَلِيخُ And the upper mill-stone is fully called פֶּלַח רֶכֶב (the rider-stone), Jud. 9:53 2Sa 11:21 and simply רֶכֶב, the lower פֶּלַח תַּחְתִּית Job 41:16.
